title: Apartments for Rent Near University Circle, Cleveland
metaTitle: Apartments for Rent Near University Circle, Cleveland
metaDescription: Apartments near University Circle in Cleveland, home to Case Western, the Cleveland Clinic, and top museums. Rent data, transit, and how to find a home nearby.
answerBox: University Circle is Cleveland's medical and educational district on the east side, home to Case Western Reserve University, the Cleveland Clinic's main campus, and the Cleveland Museum of Art. It has some of the city's newest, largest apartment buildings. Rent Finder Cleveland's nearest managed homes sit just east, in Hough and Glenville, minutes away.

sections.h2: Renting an apartment near University Circle
body: University Circle is Cleveland's University statistical planning area on the east side, home to Case Western Reserve University, the Cleveland Museum of Art, Severance Music Center, and University Hospitals, with the Cleveland Clinic's main campus immediately adjacent. It's directly served by the RTA Red Line and the HealthLine bus-rapid-transit route running the length of Euclid Avenue.

University Circle has some of Cleveland's newest and largest apartment buildings, including high-rise and mid-rise communities built or renovated near the museums and hospitals. Rent Finder Cleveland doesn't currently work with units inside University Circle itself — our own selection is concentrated a short distance east and northeast, in neighborhoods like **Hough (44103)** and **Glenville (44108)**. If you're searching specifically around University Circle, [book a free showing](/p/book-showing) and tell our team what you're looking for; we can point you toward the closest voucher-friendly homes we work with.

sections.h2: What does it cost to rent near University Circle?
body: Cleveland's overall rent benchmarks are the best available reference point for this area, since aggregator reports don't isolate University Circle on its own. Per **Zumper's** July 4, 2026 rent report, Cleveland's citywide median asking rent is **$1,250/month**; per **RentCafe's (Yardi)** July 2, 2026 report, the average among professionally-managed apartment communities — the building type most common right around University Circle — is **$1,564/month** for 787 square feet. Expect rents closer to the RentCafe figure for newer buildings near the hospitals and museums, and closer to the Zumper median farther out toward Hough or Glenville.

rows: Cleveland Museum of Art / Severance Music Center

body: The RTA Red Line's Cedar-University station sits inside University Circle, connecting directly to Tower City downtown and on to Cleveland Hopkins Airport in one direction, and toward East Cleveland's Windermere terminus in the other. The HealthLine, a dedicated bus-rapid-transit route on Euclid Avenue, links Public Square to University Circle and continues to East Cleveland, making the district one of the more transit-accessible parts of the city for renters without a car.

sections.h2: University Circle vs. Hough and Glenville
body: It's worth understanding the tradeoff between University Circle itself and the neighborhoods just east of it. University Circle offers the shortest possible walk to Case Western, University Hospitals, and the Cleveland Clinic, along with newer building amenities, generally at the RentCafe end of the local rent range. Hough and Glenville, immediately adjacent, sit on Cleveland's older residential housing stock — mostly individual units inside single-family houses, duplexes, and small multi-family buildings — at rents closer to the Zumper citywide median, with a short drive or bus ride back into University Circle for work, school, or appointments.

sections.h2: Where we work with homes near University Circle
body: We work with 90+ rental homes across Greater Cleveland, and our closest inventory to University Circle sits in the neighborhoods just east and northeast — **Hough (44103)** and **Glenville (44108)** — both a short drive from the Cleveland Clinic and Case Western campuses. Every home we work with accepts Section 8 / Housing Choice Vouchers and is HUD-inspection-ready. See our [houses for rent in Cleveland, OH](/houses-for-rent-cleveland-oh/) pillar page for the full picture of what we work with, or [start an application](/apply) if you've already found a home you like.

faq.q: Does Rent Finder Cleveland works with apartments inside University Circle?
faq.a: Not directly — our current selection doesn't include units inside the University Circle statistical planning area itself. Our closest homes sit a short distance east, in Hough (44103) and Glenville (44108). Book a free showing and tell our team what you need; we'll point you to the closest voucher-friendly option we work with.

faq.q: How much does an apartment cost near University Circle?
faq.a: Cleveland-wide, Zumper's July 4, 2026 report shows a $1,250 median asking rent, while RentCafe's July 2, 2026 report shows a $1,564 average among professionally-managed buildings — the type most common right around University Circle. Expect rents nearer the higher end close to the hospitals and museums.

faq.q: What is University Circle known for?
faq.a: University Circle is home to Case Western Reserve University, the Cleveland Museum of Art, Severance Music Center, University Hospitals, and the Cleveland Clinic's main campus immediately adjacent. It's one of Cleveland's principal medical and educational districts.

faq.q: How do I get to University Circle without a car?
faq.a: The RTA Red Line's Cedar-University station sits directly inside University Circle, with a direct line to downtown's Tower City and Cleveland Hopkins Airport. The HealthLine bus-rapid-transit route also connects University Circle to Public Square and East Cleveland along Euclid Avenue.

faq.q: Are there Section 8 apartments available near University Circle?
faq.a: Every home Rent Finder Cleveland works with, including our nearby homes in Hough and Glenville, accepts Housing Choice Vouchers and is HUD-inspection-ready. Ohio has no statewide law requiring landlords to accept vouchers, so acceptance elsewhere in the immediate University Circle area varies by owner.
